name: FOCUS UNIVERSAL INC.
business: Focus Universal Inc. designs and sells digital sensor products, horticultural sensors and filters, and IoT installation services for audio/video systems, lighting control, and automation for residential, commercial, and industrial customers. The company is also commercializing a universal smart technology platform (USIP) and an AI-enabled financial reporting software under a SaaS model. It operates through subsidiaries including Perfecular Inc., AVX Design and Integration, Focus Shenzhen, and Lusher Inc.

exposures.sentence: We have designed a full line of products for the gardening industry by integrating the Ubiquitor device into a gardening system, which includes the Ubiquitor connected to a light control node, temperature sensor, humidity sensor, digital light sensor, quantum PAR sensor, pH sensor, total dissolved solids (TDS) sensor and carbon dioxide sensor.

Our financial reporting software is an artificial intelligence (AI) enabled software designed to aid accounting professional with the preparation of reports based on financial statements, such reports on Form 10-Q and Form 10-K.

We have developed an innovative device on a chip (DoC) technology, which combines the required electronic circuits of various integrated circuit components onto a single, integrated chip (IC), and our DoC technology includes both the hardware and software, and decreases the number of interconnections between components.

Our ultra-narrowband (UNB) wireless communication 5G+ technology aims to achieve both low band 5G coverage and 1 Gbps high-band speed because we employ an ultra-narrow spectrum channel (1kHz) to establish an ultra-long-distance link between the 5G base station and the receiver.
We have developed an innovative device on a chip (DoC) technology, which combines the required electronic circuits of various integrated circuit components onto a single, integrated chip (IC).
We have successfully developed ultra-narrowband PLC technology that can transfer data through the power grid.

Perfecular Inc. was founded in September 2009, is headquartered in Ontario, California, and is engaged in designing certain digital sensor products, and sells a broad selection of horticultural sensors and filters in North America and Europe.

catalysts.sentence: On January 21, 2026, the Company entered into a purchase, sale, and escrow agreement with 901 Corporate Center, LP to acquire a 100,743 sq. ft. office and commercial building, along with a four-level parking structure, located in Monterey Park, California.

catalysts.event: Redemption request for Series B Preferred Stock
catalysts.sentence: On January 19, 2026, the Company received requests for redemption (the Redemption Notices) from the holders of the outstanding shares of Series B Convertible Preferred Stock.

catalysts.event: Renewed redemption request and notice of default
catalysts.sentence: On March 17, 2026, after the parties could not successfully negotiate a settlement, the Series B holders renewed their redemption requests by emailing Company management a notice of default.

tamClaims.sentence: Forecasts suggest that by 2030, around 50 billion of these IoT devices will be in use worldwide, creating a massive web of interconnected devices spanning everything from smartphones to kitchen appliances.

A World Economic Forum report stated that by 2035 5G networks would contribute $13.2 trillion in economic value globally and generate 22.3 million jobs in the 5G global value chain from direct network investments and residual services.

tamClaims.claim: Global spending on 5G to reach $620 billion by 2025
tamClaims.sentence: According to THALES, total global spending on 5G is set to reach $620 billion by 2025.
